title: 3 x Ant Killer Powder
features: Pestshield ant killer powder is an advanced formula which provides an effective way to eliminate unwanted ands and crawling insects in and around your home.
The formula is effective to be used indoor and hard outdoor surfaces such as patios, paths and driveways
It can also be used effectively on wasp nest too.

The easy pour bottle allows for a maximum coverage and is fast acting and long lasting. Kills ants, cockroaches, beetles, earwigs, silver fish, woodlice, wasps, and other crawling insects. The active ingredient is 0.5% w/w Permethrin which is effective against control of ants, cockroaches, beetles, earwigs, silverfish, woodlice, wasps and other crawling insects.
description: 3x PestShield Ant Killer Powder 150g. Pestshield ant killer powder is an advanced formula which provides an effective way to eliminate unwanted ands and crawling insects in and around your home. The formula is effective to be used indoor and hard outdoor surfaces such as patios, paths and driveways. It can also be used effectively on wasp nest too. The easy pour bottle allows for a maximum coverage and is fast acting and long lasting. Kills ants, cockroaches, beetles, earwigs, silver fish, woodlice, wasps, and other crawling insects. The active ingredient is 0.5% w/w Permethrin which is effective against control of ants, cockroaches, beetles, earwigs, silverfish, woodlice, wasps and other crawling insects.
